sentence: 她买了一辆银色的自行车。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī liàng yínsè de zìxíngchē.

sentence: 这位射手每次都能射中靶心。
pinyin: Zhè wèi shèshǒu měi cì dōu néng shèzhòng bǎxīn.
english: This archer hits the bullseye every time.

meaning: 1. to take pity on; 2. pity; 3. mercy
pinyin: Tā duì liúlàng māo chōngmǎn liánmǐn.
english: He feels great pity for stray cats.

sentence: 他穿了一件蓝白条纹的衬衫。
pinyin: Tā chuān le yī jiàn lán bái tiáowén de chènshān.
english: He wore a blue and white striped shirt.

sentence: 游客们在神庙前拍了很多照片。
pinyin: Yóukè men zài shénmiào qián pāi le hěn duō zhàopiàn.
english: The tourists took many photos in front of the temple.
